title: OpenSynaptic L2 Protocol Conformant
description: Cross-implementation packet exchange, field agreement, and CRC cross-checks on top of L1 wire compatibility.

requirements.title: Interoperability canonical dataset
requirements.note: Detailed procedural narrative remains in the certification document, while this dataset manifest is the machine-readable source for L2 case ids and expectations.

execution.note: When evaluating a single implementation, required cases are filtered to the procedures and producer-consumer pairs in which that implementation participates.

passCriteria.note: The full ecosystem matrix contains 8 required cases. Implementation-scoped reports should compute totals after applicability filtering.

skipPolicy.note: If an implementation cannot satisfy a required L2 role, it should not claim L2 conformance.
